rank_math_title: Sun in Pisces: Meaning, Traits & Crystals
content:
Sun in Pisces: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Sun in Pisces blends the archetypal drive of Sun (who you are at your core, your life force and creative self-expression) with the Water, mutable nature of Pisces.

  • Planet: Sun — identity, ego, vitality, self-expression, life purpose
  • Sign: Pisces (Water/Mutable) — dreams, compassion, mysticism, surrender, imagination

Eastern Perspective

Parallel Eastern reference (not historical correspondence): 七曜 (Seven Luminaries: Sun/Moon + Mars=火/水/木/金/土 五星 mapped to 火曜/水曜/木曜/金曜/土曜). Use as parallel frame only, not as Western-Eastern historical equivalence.
